class.name: InputHapticEffectConstant
class.brief_description: A haptic effect that represents a constant force.
class.description: A haptic effect that represents a constant force (with a type of [constant InputHapticEffect.HAPTIC_EFFECT_CONSTANT]). A constant force is a force with a defined magnitude and duration. You can apply an envelope to a constant force to give it shape, see also [member attack_length], [member attack_level], [member fade_length], and [member fade_level]. [b]Note:[/b] See [url=https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/windows/desktop/ee416339(v=vs.85)]DirectInput documentation[/url] for more information.

members.member: Nominal magnitude of the effect (between [code]0.0[/code] and [code]1.0[/code]).
